steps.title: Spot the clause and list structure
steps.content:
Before the blank: independent clause stating that the poem contains three signature elements of Gwendolyn Brooks's poetic [word].
After the blank: list items that are noun phrases, not independent clauses.

steps.title: Apply the colon rule
steps.content: A colon introduces a list or elaboration after an independent clause — here, naming the elements before the colon and introducing them after. The period creates a fragment, and the semicolon and comma cannot properly introduce the list. This matches choice C — C is correct.
